description_long: This is a digital representation of a young child standing with arms extended horizontally to the sides, as if in a T-pose. The child has short, straight hair and is dressed in a long-sleeved, buttoned shirt that extends to the upper thighs, paired with loose-fitting pants. The child is barefoot, with visible toes and natural skin tone on the hands and feet. The facial features are soft and youthful, with a rounded face and small ears. The clothing appears simple and practical, suitable for everyday urban environments, and there are no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A barefoot child stands with arms outstretched, wearing a long-sleeved shirt and loose pants, with short straight hair and a youthful appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the child's face, outstretched arms, buttoned shirt, loose pants, and bare feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the shirt's length, and the relaxed posture of the arms and feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with both arms extended and the back of the legs and feet visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, shirt, and pants, with the right arm and foot in profile.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved buttoned shirt and loose-fitting pants
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with a side part
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
